name: PAYOMATIC
description_short: PAYOMATIC is New York's largest check-cashing and financial services network with nearly 140 locations offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and prepaid cards.
description_long:
PAYOMATIC operates as a multi-service financial services provider headquartered in New York with an extensive network of nearly 140 stores across the Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, Long Island, and surrounding NYC areas. The company specializes in check-cashing services as its core offering but has expanded into complementary financial services to serve underbanked and unbanked consumers who need immediate access to cash and payment solutions.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including check cashing (payroll, government, and tax checks), business check cashing with competitive rates and same-day large payouts, Western Union money transfers to over 200 countries, bill payment services for major utilities and providers, money orders, the inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with mobile app access, prepaid mobile top-ups, and direct deposit options. Their business check-cashing service specifically targets small business owners needing immediate liquidity for supplies, payroll, and operational expenses.

PAYOMATIC distinguishes itself through its dense store network concentrated in the New York metropolitan area, positioning itself as the largest Western Union agent in New York. The company emphasizes speed and convenience with no holding periods on checks, immediate cash access at any store location, 24/7 access via the inPOWER app, and extended store hours (some locations open until 10 PM on Fridays). Their competitive rates on business checks and access to a network of nearly 150 stores provide operational advantages for business owners requiring regular check-cashing services.

The honest assessment is that PAYOMATIC is fundamentally a check-cashing and alternative financial services provider designed for consumers without traditional bank accounts or those needing immediate cash access. While convenient and fast, check-cashing and prepaid card services typically carry fees that make them more expensive than traditional banking for routine financial transactions. The service is best suited for consumers in the NYC area who need quick cash conversion, lack banking relationships, or require specialized services like business check cashing.
pros: Nearly 140 convenient store locations across NYC area (Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, Long Island) with dense coverage
Largest Western Union agent in New York with ability to send money to 200+ countries
No holding period on checks — immediate cash access at time of cashing
Extended store hours with some locations open until 10 PM Friday and 9 PM weekdays
Same-day large payouts available for business check customers with competitive rates
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with 24/7 mobile app access for cardless transactions
Business check-cashing with customized services and generous limits for business owners
Bill payment service covering 100+ companies including major utilities (Con Edison, Verizon, National Grid)
cons: Check-cashing and prepaid card services carry fees that make them more expensive than traditional bank accounts for routine use
Limited to NYC metropolitan area — no national presence or online check deposit options mentioned
Prepaid card and check-cashing services do not build credit history, limiting long-term financial benefits
Website does not disclose specific fee structures or rates, requiring in-person visits to determine exact costs
Primarily serves unbanked/underbanked consumers, indicating higher costs relative to traditional banking alternatives
best_for: Small business owners needing fast, same-day cash for checks and operational expenses
NYC residents without traditional bank accounts seeking immediate check-to-cash conversion
International money senders using Western Union to transfer funds to 200+ countries
Consumers needing bill payment services for utilities and multiple companies with expedited processing
diagnosis: PAYOMATIC is best for NYC-area small business owners and unbanked consumers who need immediate check-to-cash conversion and lack traditional bank relationships. The primary caveat is that check-cashing and prepaid card services carry fees making them more expensive than traditional banking, and they do not build credit history or offer long-term wealth-building tools.
services: Business check cashing with competitive rates and same-day payouts
Western Union money transfers (send and receive to 200+ countries)
Bill payment (100+ companies including utilities, credit cards, prepaid cards)
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with mobile app
Financial services across nearly 140 store locations
